summary:
**Updated Summary:**

The dataset encompasses records from **20,000 distinct cities**. This number represents the unique geographic footprint of our records, confirming that the data spans 20,000 separate urban locations, with each city counted only once regardless of how many times it appears in the table. This extensive geographic footprint underscores a very broad and diverse market presence, customer base, or operational scope, reflecting the wide reach and variety inherent in the data.
title: 20,000 Distinct Cities in Dataset
